utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No , not that , I mean , what about you and Mindy ?

utterances.speaker: Barry
utterances.text: Well , if you want , I will just ... I will just break it off with her .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No . No ... no ... no ... no , no . I mean , do not do that . Not , I mean not for me .

emotion_cause.span: 2_if you want , I will just ... I will just break it off with her .

utterances.speaker: Bernice
utterances.text: Dr . Farber , Bobby Rush is here for his adjustment .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , Barry ! Come on , this is all way too ...

utterances.speaker: Barry
utterances.text: We can , we can go to Aruba !

utterances.speaker: Barry
utterances.text: When I went there on what would have been our honeymoon , it was , uh ... it was really nice . You would have liked it .

emotion_cause.span: 9_it was really nice . You would have liked it .

utterances.speaker: Barry
utterances.text: All right Miss Green , everything looks fine ... Yep , I think we are starting to see some real progress here .

utterances.speaker: Bobby
utterances.text: I am twelve , I am not stupid .
